name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ The classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft body bag. The metal knots are crafted using jewelry techniques with micro-cast aluminum🪢, and the decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you flip between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, the shoulder strap is adjustable. The original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".
